_meta.citation: PNTS-01 edge case: negative monthly_savings (rate-up scenario; points cost MORE than they save) -> simple_breakeven returns None (D-03-01); npv walk strictly decreases so npv_breakeven also None; warning emitted at PointsResponse layer (D-03-01 mirrors Phase 4 D-11). decision forced to 'skip_points' per D-03-04 defensive force.

notes: Rate-up scenario: caller-supplied monthly_savings=-10.00 round-trips through the relaxed signed-Decimal field (D-03-07 mirrors Phase 6 D-03 RefiCashflow.amount precedent — Money's ge=0 would block this construction). cum_npv at hold = -8000 + 120*(discounted -10) ~ -8861.26. Both breakeven outputs are None; decision is forced to 'skip_points' per D-03-04. Per D-05-01 engine-emitted values.
